# Calligraphy Guide Sheet Generator 🖋️

*Note: The codebase for this application was generated by Google Gemini.*

A powerful, highly customizable desktop application built in Python for generating, exporting, and printing professional calligraphy guide sheets. Designed for calligraphers who need precision, the app supports dynamic grid generation, slants, ovals, dot grids, and radial (envelope) modes. 

All guides can be previewed in real-time, exported to raw SVG vector files (with embedded state data), and directly printed using Inkscape and SumatraPDF integration.

## ✨ Features

* **Real-Time Live Preview:** A fully interactive canvas with zoom, pan, and dynamic scaling.
* **Custom Configurable Grids:** Adjust page size, margins, pen width, and group gaps.
* **Script Presets:** Built-in configurations for popular hands:
  * *Italic (10°)*
  * *Copperplate (55°)*
  * *Spencerian (52°)*
* **Advanced Guidelines:**
  * **Horizontals:** Define unlimited custom lines (Ascender, X-Height, Base, Descender) with custom line weights and styles (Solid, Dashed, Dotted).
  * **Slants:** Overlay custom slant lines with precise degree angles and spacing.
  * **Ovals:** Automatically generate perfectly sheared oval guidelines between designated top and bottom lines.
  * **Dynamic X-Markers:** Automatically draws "X" height markers on the left margin, scaling perfectly to 80% of your defined core writing area.
  * **Dot Grids:** Overlay a customizable dot matrix.
  * **Radial Mode:** Generate curved (envelope) baselines with precise radius controls.
* **Smart SVG Export & Load:** Saves your grid as a high-quality SVG vector. The app uniquely embeds your exact UI state (JSON) inside the SVG `<desc>` tag, allowing you to load an SVG back into the app later and continue editing!
* **Silent Printing:** Uses Inkscape to convert SVGs to PDF on the fly, seamlessly routing it to your system's default printer using SumatraPDF.

---

## 🛠️ Requirements & Dependencies

To run the application, you will need **Python 3.7+** and the following dependencies:

### Python Packages
```bash
pip install customtkinter
```

*(Note: `tkinter` is included with standard Python installations).*

### External Software (For Printing)
If you wish to use the **🖨️ Print** feature directly from the app, you must install:
1. **[Inkscape](https://inkscape.org/):** Required for converting the generated SVG into a printable PDF via command-line.
2. **[SumatraPDF](https://www.sumatrapdfreader.org/free-pdf-reader):** Used for silent background printing. The executable (`SumatraPDF-3.6.1-64.exe`) is already placed in the same directory as the Python script.

---

## 🚀 Installation & Usage

1. **Clone or Download** the repository to your local machine.
2. Ensure you have installed the required Python packages (`customtkinter`).
3. Run the application:
   `python "Calligraphy Guide Generator.py"`

### Using the Application
* **Parameters Panel (Left):** Use the sidebar to control all visual aspects of your guide sheet. Adjust page size, pen width, margins, colors, and line configurations.
* **Canvas Controls:** * Click and drag to **pan** around the preview.
  * Use the mouse wheel to **zoom** in and out.
  * Click `Reset View` button to fit the page to screen.
* **Save/Load:** Click `Save SVG` to generate your file. To edit a previous configuration, click `Load SVG` and select a file previously generated by this app.

---

## 🏗️ Architecture Overview

The codebase is structured to enforce a strict separation of concerns, ensuring long-term maintainability and performance:

* **GridConfig & RenderData (Data Layer):** `@dataclass` structures that cleanly manage the flow of UI state into the rendering engine without complex boilerplate.
* **GeometryEngine (Logic Layer):** A stateless math engine that processes the GridConfig and calculates all raw millimeter coordinates for straight lines, trigonometric slant intersections, and sheared ovals.
* **SvgExporter (Export Layer):** Translates `RenderData` directly into standard XML/SVG format, dynamically injecting the GridConfig JSON state for future editing.
* **CalligraphyApp (Presentation Layer):** The CustomTkinter UI. Handles debounced event bindings, user interactions, and translates real-world millimeters into zoom-aware screen pixels dynamically.

---
